mechanics.excerpt: Thenation possesses some of the best higher-leve schools in the Inner Sphere but all are located New Avalon 0r one of the other core worlds Periphery nations feel the lack of education most bitterly: Perennially cash-strapped, they must work hard to provide even tair primary schools and these are rarely available to the entire population.
